//: 灾变仙路 mod 专属爆炸视觉库 / Path of Immortals — mod-owned explosion-light recipes. 本文件夹收纳 mod 自己的 explosion_light 定义，让修仙神通的视觉自洽、可独立调参，不依赖也不污染主仓库 data/json/explosion_lights.json 的 default_blast/fire_blast。新增神通视觉一律在此定义、由对应 SPELL 的 explosion_light 字段引用。/ This folder holds the mod's own explosion_light definitions so cultivation-art visuals are self-contained and independently tunable, without touching the base game's recipes.
//params: 火弹术专属火焰爆炸。针对小范围（aoe 1~2 格）调优：spread_jitter 调大到 0.22，配合 fork 的自适应 rim_taper（小爆炸不 taper），让这枚小火弹的边缘真正不规则、不再是死板对称块。配色比主仓库 fire_blast 更偏赤金灵焰（道家三昧真火意象），flicker 更躁动。冲击波收窄、随小范围快速扩散后即收。/ Fireball's own fire blast, tuned for a small (1-2 tile) area: stronger spread_jitter plays into the fork's size-adaptive rim taper so the small blast's edge is genuinely irregular. Crimson-gold spirit-flame palette, livelier flicker, a tight quick shockwave.

寒泉迸专属水蓝迸溅。针对小范围（aoe 1~2 格）调优,与火弹术同走自适应 rim_taper。配色走「水」意象：A 为亮青白（飞溅的冷泉与水沫高光）,B 为深海蓝（迸溅落定的寒涛）,与火弹的赤金恰成冷暖对照。水不像火那样躁动,故 flicker 压低（0.16，柔和粼光而非火焰乱跳）、color_jitter 略低；wave 扩散稍快（寒泉激射）、fade 略长（水痕未即收）。冲击波更强更利（水迸的溅射冲击感）：strength/speed 略高于火弹,thickness 收窄成一道锐利水环。/ Cold-Spring Burst's own water-blue splash, tuned for a small (1-2 tile) area like Fireball. Water palette: bright cyan-white A (cold spray and foam highlights), deep-sea blue B (the settling chill surge) — a cool counterpart to the fireball's crimson-gold. Water is calmer than fire, so flicker is lower (soft ripple-glint, not flame jitter); the wave spreads a touch faster (the lancing jet) and fades a touch slower (lingering wet sheen). A sharper, stronger shockwave for the splash impact.
